title: Tabs Alignment (TabsAlignment)
text: Tabs Alignment (TabsAlignment) The Tabs Alignment widget property determines how tabs are aligned in a horizontal strip. Default is Left . " TabsAlignment = Left | Center | Right " Usage Dynamic? Yes Supported in Grid? No Dependencies: Ignored if Justify is True Using in ProcScript You can use $properties or $fieldproperties to set or get the property and its value. For more information, see $properties and $fieldproperties . $fieldproperties(FLD) = "TabsAlignment=center" Copy Example: Right-Aligned Tab Strip If Tabs Alignment is set to right , the tabs in the tab strip are aligned to the right of the widget. $fieldproperties(TAB) = "TabsAlignment=right" Copy Figure 1. Tabs Right-Aligned in Tab Strip Applies To utabex (TabEx) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
